response.summary: Synthetic duplicated image and impossible statistics case.

checks.source_text: Figure 2 panels A and C contain the same cell morphology after rotation.
checks.reason: The same image content is reused for different conditions.
checks.recommendation: Request original image files and full figure assembly history.

checks.source_text: Multiple independent outcomes report p=0.049 with identical SD values.
checks.evidence: Repeated boundary p-values across unrelated endpoints.
checks.reason: The reported statistics are implausibly patterned.
